---
name: Suggest a Tool
about: Suggest a tool for inclusion in Awesome Legal Apps
title: "Suggest: [Tool Name]"
labels: suggestion
assignees: ''
---

## Tool Information

**Tool Name:** [Name of the tool]

**URL:** [Link to tool website or primary repository]

**Category:** [Select one: AI Tools, Legal Research, Contract Management, Practice Management, Document Management, Open Source Legal Tools, Access to Justice, Legal NLP & Datasets, Legal Education & Communities]

**Brief Description:** [One sentence describing what the tool does]

## Inclusion Criteria Verification

Please confirm the tool meets all inclusion criteria:

- [ ] **Legal-domain-specific**: Designed for or significantly used by legal professionals, law firms, legal technologists, legal researchers, or access-to-justice practitioners
- [ ] **Actively maintained**: Updated within the past 12 months
- [ ] **Publicly available**: Accessible without unreasonable barriers
- [ ] **Legal-adjacent**: Fits within legal research, practice management, document automation, legal education, or similar category

## Additional Information

**Why should this tool be included?** (2-3 sentences explaining its relevance and value)

**Last verified date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]

**Is this tool open source or free?** Yes / No

**Conflict of interest:** Do you have any relationship to this tool?
